---
title: Code Filename + Annotation (Cell, Knitr)
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
    code-annotations: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        -
          - 'quarto-code-filename\("hello\.R"\)\[\s*#Skylighting\(annotations:'
          - "quarto-annotation-item"
          - "annotations:"
        - []
---

```{r}
#| filename: "hello.R"
print("Hello, world!") # <1>
```

1. Print a greeting.
